sections.paragraph:
Original: צדד

Transliteration: tsedâd

Phonetic: tsed-awd'

BDB Definition:

Zedad = "mountain side"
  1. one of the landmarks on the northern border of Israel as promised by Moses and restated by Ezekiel

Origin: from the same as H6654

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
